title: Made Well — Land status events (the outbound status loop)
description: Brief-lifecycle status events a Contributor profile emits back to the queue/log at meaningful checkpoints and at Land. The OUTBOUND half of the Lead<->Contributor loop: the Lead writes briefs into the queue (inbound); the Contributor emits these (outbound) so the Lead sees brief-taken / blocker / escalation / landed without asking. Appended to the work event log (.madewell/work/status.jsonl), consistent with substrate.schema.json. Framework-standardized (handshake 2026-06-20, §8); a project binds the transport (Arc: status.jsonl + the merged PR + commit footer PHASE/DONE/TODO/BLOCKED).

brief.description: the brief/task id or slug claimed

reason.description: what blocks it; what would unblock it

question.description: the one clear, specific question for the lead (escalation ladder step 4)

ladder_exhausted.description: spec + codebase + docs were checked first

pr.description: the merged PR link/number — the outward DELTA face of Land

tax.description: optional: the unit's TAX (proposed - accepted); also recorded in .madewell/work/tax.jsonl
